description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Notepad Next that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: build-linux and build-windows. The build-linux job should run on ubuntu-latest, check out the repository with submodules, install Qt 5.15.2, compile the code, and upload the Linux artifact. The build-windows job should run on windows-latest with a matrix strategy for different Qt versions and modules, check out the repository with submodules, install Qt, set up VS tools, install jom, run QMake, build the code, create a package, and upload the Windows artifact.
